# Rt Tools

## Overview

gSage AI ‚Äî RT managerial dashboards.

## Tools in this group

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `rt_dashboard` | Managerial RT dashboards: per queue/status, owner workload, stalled, SLA breaches, top requesters, mean TTR and trend | `rt:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `rt_get_ticket` | Fetch one RT ticket with optional related data | `rt:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `rt_manage` | RT write/admin operations: tickets, comments, links, merges, queues, users, bulk operations and attachment download. HITL-gated. | `rt:write` | ‚úì | ‚Äî |
| `rt_search` | Search RT tickets via structured filters or TicketSQL; list RT queues | `rt:read` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below ‚Äî set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "proxy": "",
  "timeout": 30,
  "token": "",
  "url": "",
  "verify_ssl": true
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `proxy` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `""` | Optional proxy URL (http://user:pass@host:port). Empty string disables proxy. |
| `timeout` | `integer` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `30` | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default 30). |
| `token` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `""` | RT auth token (Settings ‚Üí Auth Tokens). Sensitive. |
| `url` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `""` | Base URL of the RT REST 2.0 endpoint, e.g. https://rt.example.com/REST/2.0 |
| `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `true` | Verify TLS certificate (default true). |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_RT__PROXY` | `proxy` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Optional proxy URL (http://user:pass@host:port). Empty string disables proxy. |
| `TOOL_RT__TIMEOUT` | `timeout` | `integer` | `30` | ‚Äî | HTTP request timeout in seconds (default 30). |
| `TOOL_RT__TOKEN` | `token` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | RT auth token (Settings ‚Üí Auth Tokens). Sensitive. |
| `TOOL_RT__URL` | `url` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Base URL of the RT REST 2.0 endpoint, e.g. https://rt.example.com/REST/2.0 |
| `TOOL_RT__VERIFY_SSL` | `verify_ssl` | `boolean` | `true` | ‚Äî | Verify TLS certificate (default true). |

_Note: any field above can also be overridden per-tool by using the prefix `TOOL_<TOOL_NAME>__` instead of the shared `TOOL_<NAMESPACE>__` ‚Äî useful when a single tool in the family needs a distinct value._
